title: [NO TESTS NEEDED]  Suggestions for typos/ incorrect commands for Podman CLI
body:
Fixes #9715 
```
$ bin/podman attacks
Error: unrecognized command `podman attacks`

Did you mean this?
        attach

Try 'podman --help' for more information.
```
```
$ bin/podman containers
Error: unrecognized command `podman containers`

Did you mean this?
        container

Try 'podman --help' for more information.
```

Signed-off-by: Mehul Arora <aroram18@mcmaster.ca>
